thiruvanmiyur.name: Thiruvanmiyur
thiruvanmiyur.description: Southern coastal neighbourhood with strong residential fabric and predictable weekend pressure along ECR connectors.

besant-nagar.name: Besant Nagar
besant-nagar.description: Leafy coastal residential quarter; event and beach traffic spikes are seasonal but sharp.

nungambakkam.name: Nungambakkam
nungambakkam.description: Hospital, hotel, and consulate density with CBD spillover; VIP movement closures hit this belt first.

navalur.name: Navalur
navalur.description: Southern OMR apartment and services belt; commute and metro-phase updates matter daily.

siruseri.name: Siruseri
siruseri.description: SIPCOT and IT park concentration toward the southern end of the IT corridor.

adyar.name: Adyar
adyar.description: Coastal, residential, institutional, and premium urban neighbourhood along the Adyar river and estuary.

velachery.name: Velachery
velachery.description: High-density mixed-use locality connecting southern neighbourhoods with retail cores and IT corridors.

sholinganallur.name: Sholinganallur
sholinganallur.description: Major IT and residential growth cluster on the OMR belt with dense tech parks and apartment corridors.

royapuram.name: Royapuram
royapuram.description: Historic northern urban district with maritime and transport relevance and dense mixed-use blocks.

tambaram.name: Tambaram belt
tambaram.description: Southern transit and residential gateway with suburban expansion importance toward Chengalpattu.

perungudi.name: Perungudi
perungudi.description: Dense IT and services belt; monsoon flooding hotspots differ from core-city storm drains — verify GCC bulletins.

t-nagar.name: T. Nagar
t-nagar.description: Retail core with intense festival-season footfall; pair with metro and last-mile planning.

kodambakkam.name: Kodambakkam
kodambakkam.description: Film-industry adjacency and buzzing evening economy; mixed residential and commercial fabric.

anna-nagar.name: Anna Nagar
anna-nagar.description: Western-central residential grid with strong metro feeders and clinic/school demand.

ambattur.name: Ambattur
ambattur.description: Industrial estates beside dense residential blocks; hiring and logistics stories cluster here.

guindy.name: Guindy
guindy.description: Major interchange for metro, MTC, and airport-bound traffic; disruptions ripple city-wide.

porur.name: Porur
porur.description: Western suburban growth near Porur lake; storm-water and bund stories matter each monsoon.

tondiarpet.name: Tondiarpet
tondiarpet.description: Dense mixed-use northern wards; waterlogging and road cuts are highly hyperlocal.

madhavaram.name: Madhavaram
madhavaram.description: Wholesale and mofussil bus links; fast-growing northern apartment belts.

tiruvottiyur.name: Tiruvottiyur
tiruvottiyur.description: North coastal wards with fishing harbour links and industrial belt adjacency.

manali.name: Manali
manali.description: Industrial pockets near Ennore; freight, safety, and air-quality stories cluster here.

omr-belt.name: OMR belt
omr-belt.description: Logical corridor view: Perungudi through Sholinganallur IT and apartment spine.

ecr-belt.name: ECR belt
ecr-belt.description: East Coast Road–oriented coastal residential and leisure corridor (logical grouping).
